items.problem: (markDebtResolved) No length validation on --reason allows multi-MB justification strings to exhaust disk and trigger OOM on subsequent ReadAll calls
atcr debt resolve output changed from "Marked %s resolved." to "Marked %s %s." breaking scripts that parse the output string

Reason-only guard skips validation and silently falls through: `cmd.Flags().Changed("status")` does not guard --reason, so `--reason "text" --resolve` is required but `--reason "text"` alone bypasses the guard and proceeds to markDebtResolved which then errors on missing id (user gets an unhelpful "no open item" error instead of a clear usage hint). The --status case correctly uses `Changed("status")`. Align --reason guard with the --status pattern: `cmd.Flags().Changed("status")

positions.problem: Reason-only guard skips validation and silently falls through: `cmd.Flags().Changed("status")` does not guard --reason, so `--reason "text" --resolve` is required but `--reason "text"` alone bypasses the guard and proceeds to markDebtResolved which then errors on missing id (user gets an unhelpful "no open item" error instead of a clear usage hint). The --status case correctly uses `Changed("status")`. Align --reason guard with the --status pattern: `cmd.Flags().Changed("status")

items.problem: The error message for invalid `--status` value uses `mustFlag(cmd, "status")` (original casing) while the lookup uses the lowercased `status` variable, so a user typing "--status RESOLVED" sees "invalid --status 'RESOLVED'" rather than the canonical lowercase form. Not a crash, but inconsistent with the lowercasing that actually controls the logic.

positions.problem: The error message for invalid `--status` value uses `mustFlag(cmd, "status")` (original casing) while the lookup uses the lowercased `status` variable, so a user typing "--status RESOLVED" sees "invalid --status 'RESOLVED'" rather than the canonical lowercase form. Not a crash, but inconsistent with the lowercasing that actually controls the logic.

items.problem: The status validation rejects empty string, but no test covers `--status ""`.

positions.problem: The status validation rejects empty string, but no test covers `--status ""`.

items.problem: The reason trimming logic treats whitespace-only reason as empty (preserving existing justification), but no test covers `--reason "   "`.

positions.problem: The reason trimming logic treats whitespace-only reason as empty (preserving existing justification), but no test covers `--reason "   "`.

items.problem: The new tests (`TestDebtResolve_WontfixStatusFoldsItemOutOfOpenList`, `TestDebtResolve_MarkWontfixSetsStatusAndFoldsOut`, etc.) cover the happy path for wontfix but do not include a test for the idempotency case: resolving an already-closed item with `--status wontfix` when a `resolved` record already exists (or vice versa). The existing `TestDebtResolve_MarkResolvedIsIdempotent` covers this for `--status resolved`, but the wontfix variant is missing, leaving the "already resolved" hardcoded-message regression (finding 1) untested for wontfix closures.

positions.problem: The new tests (`TestDebtResolve_WontfixStatusFoldsItemOutOfOpenList`, `TestDebtResolve_MarkWontfixSetsStatusAndFoldsOut`, etc.) cover the happy path for wontfix but do not include a test for the idempotency case: resolving an already-closed item with `--status wontfix` when a `resolved` record already exists (or vice versa). The existing `TestDebtResolve_MarkResolvedIsIdempotent` covers this for `--status resolved`, but the wontfix variant is missing, leaving the "already resolved" hardcoded-message regression (finding 1) untested for wontfix closures.

items.problem: `TestDebtResolve_NoReasonPreservesExistingJustification` verifies that omitting `--reason` preserves an existing justification, but does not test the edge case where the original record has an empty `Justification` and `--reason` is also omitted — does the new record get a blank `Justification` (zero-value field) or does it remain unset? This matters for clients that distinguish between "no justification provided" (nil/empty) and "justification is empty string".
